extracted_equations.text: P_{\text{hist}} \;=\; P[1/2] \times X[576/1250] \times A[36/50] \times G[1/1] \times E^{\text{con}}[4/5 \cdot 3/5 \cdot 3/4] \times E^{\text{pro}}[2/1 \cdot 2/1 \cdot 2/1]
P_{\text{hist}} \;=\; P[2/1] \times X[1/1] \times A[36/50] \times G[1/1] \times E^{\text{con}}[4/5] \times E^{\text{pro}}[8/1]

P_{\text{hist}} = P\!\left[\tfrac{2}{1}\right] \times X[1] \times A\!\left[\tfrac{36}{50}\right] \times G[1] \times E^{\text{con}}\!\left[\tfrac{4}{5}\right] \times E^{\text{pro}}\!\left[\tfrac{8}{1}\right] = \tfrac{36.864}{1}
$P_{\text{hist}} \;=\; P[1/2] \times X[576/1250] \times A[36/50] \times G[1/1] \times E^{\text{con}}[4/5 \cdot 3/5 \cdot 3/4] \times E^{\text{pro}}[2/1 \cdot 2/1 \cdot 2/1]

P = prior. X = extra-biblical sources. A = Acts. G = Gospels. E con = three Pauline silences. E pro = three Pauline historicity passages. Plain English: Carrier's upper-bound result. The math is clean given his inputs; the article's whole correction operates upstream of the math — on the reference class that fixes the prior. Corrected Posterior (All Three Fixes)

C = coherence. G = grace input. S·χ(t) = entropy drain on the χ field. Plain English: The article's mechanism for what happens when a fully Logos-coupled consciousness undergoes death and the coherence field remains intact: G overwhelms the entropy drain; coherence reaches its theoretical maximum. The resurrection reframed not as a category-error miracle but as a predicted coherence-restoration event. Empirical Anchors for Logos Coupling

, inter-substrate coupling) that determines how the field acts on a subsystem. Distinct from the field itself: field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. Entropy / Sin (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
$$P_{\text{hist}} \;=\; P[1/2] \times X[576/1250] \times A[36/50] \times G[1/1] \times E^{\text{con}}[4/5 \cdot 3/5 \cdot 3/4] \times E^{\text{pro}}[2/1 \cdot 2/1 \cdot 2/1]$$
$$P_{\text{hist}} \;=\; P[2/1] \times X[1/1] \times A[36/50] \times G[1/1] \times E^{\text{con}}[4/5] \times E^{\text{pro}}[8/1]$$

$$P_{\text{hist}} = P\!\left[\tfrac{2}{1}\right] \times X[1] \times A\!\left[\tfrac{36}{50}\right] \times G[1] \times E^{\text{con}}\!\left[\tfrac{4}{5}\right] \times E^{\text{pro}}\!\left[\tfrac{8}{1}\right] = \tfrac{36.864}{1}$$

The probability rule of QM: P(outcome) = |⟨φ|ψ⟩| 2 . Cited as a Projection-Principle instance — three irreducible operations (prepare, evolve, measure / Father, Son, Spirit). (Defined in detail in Article 06.)
